description_long: This community center is a large, U-shaped building with a red-tiled gabled roof and white stucco exterior walls accented by tan trim. The structure features two symmetrical wings connected by a central section, which includes a prominent main entrance with a decorative pediment and a set of stairs leading up to double doors. The facade is lined with evenly spaced rectangular windows, each framed with tan molding and small decorative balconies on the upper floors. The building sits on a raised foundation with a tan base, and the overall design is formal and balanced, suggesting a civic or institutional function. The roof is pitched and uniform, with no visible skylights or rooftop structures. The architectural details, such as the window moldings and entrance pediment, add a sense of grandeur and historical character to the building.
description: A large, U-shaped community center with a red-tiled roof, white stucco walls, and a grand central entrance with stairs and decorative trim.
description_view_0: Side view showing one wing of the building, with rows of windows and the red-tiled roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the main entrance with stairs, decorative pediment, and symmetrical wings extending on both sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the other wing and the same window arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the long back facade with evenly spaced windows and no visible entrance or decorative elements.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the front facade, accessed by a wide set of stairs leading to double doors. The entrance is framed by a decorative pediment and flanked by symmetrical windows. No ramps or automatic doors are visible, and the entrance is integrated with the building's formal architectural style.
attribute_architectural_style: The building exhibits a Neoclassical or Colonial Revival architectural style, characterized by its symmetrical U-shaped layout, red-tiled gabled roof, white stucco walls, decorative window moldings, and a prominent central entrance with a pediment.
